case_title: PANCHAL, DHAVAL vs. FISHER, MICHAEL ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANCHAL, DHAVAL SERVED MAR-08-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, MICHAEL ANTHONY CLARK, SHARRON MARIANNA
